mapper.select: select c.*, p.product_name, p.main_image, p.price, p.unit, p.stock, p.seller_id from cart_item c left join product_info p on c.product_id = p.id where c.user_id = #{userId} order by c.id desc
select * from cart_item where user_id = #{userId} and product_id = #{productId} limit 1
select c.*, p.product_name, p.main_image, p.price, p.unit, p.stock, p.seller_id from cart_item c left join product_info p on c.product_id = p.id where c.id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into cart_item (user_id, product_id, quantity) values (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity})
mapper.update: update cart_item set quantity = #{quantity} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from user_address where user_id = #{userId} order by is_default desc, id asc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into user_address (user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, area, detail_address, is_default) values (#{userId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{area}, #{detailAddress}, #{isDefault})
mapper.update: update user_address set receiver_name = #{receiverName}, receiver_phone = #{receiverPhone}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, area = #{area}, detail_address = #{detailAddress}, is_default = #{isDefault} where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: delete from user_address where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select p.*, su.real_name as seller_name, pc.category_name from product_info p left join sys_user su on p.seller_id = su.id left join product_category pc on p.category_id = pc.id where p.id = #{productId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into order_info (order_no, user_id, seller_id, total_amount, order_status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, remark, pay_time) values (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{sellerId}, #{totalAmount}, #{orderStatus}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverAddress}, #{remark}, #{payTime})

insert into order_item (order_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, price, quantity, amount) values (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productImage}, #{price}, #{quantity}, #{amount})
mapper.select:
select oi.*, buyer.real_name as user_name, seller.real_name as seller_name from order_info oi left join sys_user buyer on oi.user_id = buyer.id left join sys_user seller on oi.seller_id = seller.id
and oi.order_status = #{status}
and (oi.order_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or buyer.real_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or seller.real_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by oi.id desc

select oi.*, buyer.real_name as user_name, seller.real_name as seller_name from order_info oi left join sys_user buyer on oi.user_id = buyer.id left join sys_user seller on oi.seller_id = seller.id where oi.id = #{id}

select oi.id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.product_name, ifnull(nullif(p.main_image, ''), oi.product_image) as product_image, oi.price, oi.quantity, oi.amount from order_item oi left join product_info p on oi.product_id = p.id where oi.order_id = #{orderId} order by oi.id asc
mapper.update: update order_info set order_status = #{status}, delivery_time = case when #{status} = 'PENDING_RECEIVE' then now() else delivery_time end, finish_time = case when #{status} = 'FINISHED' then now() else finish_time end where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select oi.id, oi.order_id, oi.id as order_item_id, oi.product_id, oi.product_name, ifnull(nullif(p.main_image, ''), oi.product_image) as product_image, ofi.order_no, oi.quantity, null as score, null as content, null as reply_content, null as comment_time, null as status, null as user_name from order_item oi left join order_info ofi on oi.order_id = ofi.id left join product_info p on oi.product_id = p.id left join product_comment pc on pc.order_item_id = oi.id where ofi.user_id = #{userId} and ofi.order_status = 'FINISHED' and pc.id is null order by ofi.finish_time desc, oi.id desc

select pc.*, oi.product_name, ifnull(nullif(p.main_image, ''), oi.product_image) as product_image, ofi.order_no, oi.quantity from product_comment pc left join order_item oi on pc.order_item_id = oi.id left join order_info ofi on pc.order_id = ofi.id left join product_info p on oi.product_id = p.id where pc.user_id = #{userId} order by pc.id desc

select pc.*, oi.product_name, ifnull(nullif(p.main_image, ''), oi.product_image) as product_image, ofi.order_no, ifnull(nullif(buyer.real_name, ''), buyer.username) as user_name, buyer.avatar as user_avatar, ifnull(nullif(seller.real_name, ''), seller.username) as seller_name, seller.avatar as seller_avatar from product_comment pc left join order_item oi on pc.order_item_id = oi.id left join order_info ofi on pc.order_id = ofi.id left join product_info p on oi.product_id = p.id left join sys_user buyer on pc.user_id = buyer.id left join sys_user seller on ofi.seller_id = seller.id
and pc.status = #{status}
and (oi.product_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or pc.content like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or buyer.real_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or buyer.username like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or seller.real_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or seller.username like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or ofi.order_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by pc.id desc

select pc.*, oi.product_name, ifnull(nullif(p.main_image, ''), oi.product_image) as product_image, ofi.order_no, ifnull(nullif(buyer.real_name, ''), buyer.username) as user_name, buyer.avatar as user_avatar from product_comment pc left join order_item oi on pc.order_item_id = oi.id left join order_info ofi on pc.order_id = ofi.id left join product_info p on oi.product_id = p.id left join sys_user buyer on pc.user_id = buyer.id where ofi.seller_id = #{sellerId} order by pc.id desc
select * from product_comment where order_item_id = #{orderItemId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into product_comment (order_id, order_item_id, product_id, user_id, score, content, status) values (#{orderId}, #{orderItemId}, #{productId}, #{userId}, #{score}, #{content}, 'VISIBLE')
mapper.update: update product_comment set status = #{status} where id = #{id}
update product_comment set reply_content = #{replyContent} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select p.*, su.real_name as seller_name, pc.category_name from product_favorite pf left join product_info p on pf.product_id = p.id left join sys_user su on p.seller_id = su.id left join product_category pc on p.category_id = pc.id where pf.user_id = #{userId} order by pf.id desc
select id from product_favorite where user_id = #{userId} and product_id = #{productId} limit 1
mapper.delete: delete from product_favorite where user_id = #{userId} and product_id = #{productId}
